response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced generalist with roughly 19 years of hands-on development, genuine low-latency scale exposure at Dunnhumby, and current AI-agent tooling work that matches the AI-velocity preference. However, this is a Principal/IC6 role centered on experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis experience whatsoever. His track record is senior-level IC work at small-to-mid companies, without evidence of the multi-workstream, cross-team architectural leadership at enterprise scale that IC6 demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, backend, embedded, and low-latency systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Current hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) aligning with the AI-accelerated engineering preference
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, and a record of teaching and mentoring
concerns: No experimentation, growth engineering, metrics/telemetry platform, or statistical analysis experience — the core domain of the role
No evidence of principal-level scope: no multi-team initiatives, platform ownership across orgs, or enterprise-scale architectural leadership
Recent stack (TypeScript/Node, DLang, small-company product work) is distant from the C#/Java/Python enterprise measurement-systems context

key_factors.factor: Deep general engineering breadth and scale exposure
